environment_type: Secondary transit and assembly setting; wide ceremonial courtyard.
visual_summary: A large-scale ruined Martian plaza characterized by ancient stone architecture. The space functions as a communal assembly ground and ceremonial courtyard, anchored by heavy chariot parking featuring rows of decorated chariots. The area is defined by the presence of large-scale Martian military formations.
